name: Google Vertex AI MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Google Cloud Vertex AI MCP server enabling AI agents to access Google's Vertex AI platform — running inference on Gemini and other Model Garden models, accessing vector search, managing training jobs, and integrating Google Cloud's enterprise AI services into agent-driven ML workflow automation.
use_cases: Running Gemini model inference from orchestration agents
Accessing Vertex AI Model Garden models from multi-model agents
Querying Vertex AI vector search from RAG pipeline agents
Managing model training jobs from MLOps agents
Using Vertex AI multimodal capabilities from content agents
Integrating Google Cloud AI services into enterprise agent workflows
not_for: Teams not using Google Cloud Platform
Local/on-premise AI inference (Vertex AI is cloud-based)
Teams needing OpenAI or Anthropic APIs (use respective MCPs)
best_when: A team uses Google Cloud and wants AI agents to leverage Vertex AI services — particularly for Gemini inference, vector search, or Model Garden access within GCP infrastructure.
avoid_when: You don't use GCP or prefer OpenAI/Anthropic cloud services.

auth.notes: Google Cloud Application Default Credentials (ADC) or service account key required. GCP project ID and region must be configured. Vertex AI API must be enabled.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Gemini 1.5 Flash: free tier available; other models vary
pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based: Gemini 1.5 Pro from $0.00125/1k tokens input
pricing.notes: GCP billing account required. Vertex AI costs per API call. Official MCP from GoogleCloudPlatform org.

performance.rate_limits: Gemini: 1,000 RPM on paid tier; varies by model

known_agent_gotchas: GCP service account or ADC setup required — complex for non-GCP teams
Vertex AI API must be enabled in GCP project — not automatic
Costs can accumulate quickly with high-frequency inference calls
Official MCP from GoogleCloudPlatform org — well-maintained and documented
Model availability varies by GCP region
Quota increases may need to be requested for production workloads
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. GCP IAM for auth. Service account key management. Official Google Cloud MCP. Enterprise-grade security with comprehensive compliance certifications.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. GCP IAM. Service account. Official Google Cloud. Enterprise compliance.
